{{Infobox character
| name = Spider
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Spider]] has a web that can detect beings of great power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was once the heir of the [[Spider]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Spider]] is a being that [[Ozriel]] suggests [[Suriel]] check with.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The techniques of a [[Spider]] can provide access to several more senses.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
